creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 161370
poudriere failure of emulators/mess slave port

Hi,

The update on emulators/mame works in poudriere but brakes it's slave port emulators/mess.

Can you please test emulators/mess and post a new patch which fixes it?

Or, if it cannot be fixed, explain why?

Adding a poudriere log for your reference.

Thanks!
